items.title: Delhi High Court’s pathbreaking ruling on Google keyword advertising | Explained
items.summary: Justice Mini Pushkarna assessed if a company can buy another’s registered trademark as a keyword on Google Ads to have their ads appear first in searches for that trademark
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Ferrari wanted to take on Chinese EVs with the Luce - then the backlash started
items.summary: The brand's first EV has been heavily criticised, with some saying it has abandoned Ferrari's roots.

items.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
items.summary: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.
